strengths: ~17 years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud infrastructure, satisfying the 15-year minimum.
Genuine entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, built multiple open-source platforms, and has held Staff-level roles with cross-functional impact.
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq signals an emerging transition into the AI space.
concerns: AI depth is shallow and very recent — substantive AI work only appears in the current role (April 2025 onward); no demonstrated history of shipping recognized AI products or platforms at scale.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and the educational background (BS Computer Science, BA Fine Arts) does not compensate with equivalent research or applied ML credentials.

No evidence of director-level strategic advisory capacity: the resume shows no enterprise customer engagement, no published AI thought leadership, and no cross-organizational influence at the scale this role demands.
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically versatile and entrepreneurially minded engineer with a solid career spanning nearly two decades, but the profile does not yet match the seniority or specialization this Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires. The role demands a recognized AI expert who has shipped AI-powered products or platforms and can credibly advise enterprise customers and internal leadership on cloud and AI strategy; Bogdan's AI exposure is both recent and narrow, confined to tooling and agentic infrastructure work begun in 2025. Without an advanced AI-related degree, a track record of AI product ownership at scale, or demonstrated strategic advisory work, he is more accurately positioned as a strong Staff/Senior engineer in transition toward AI rather than a director-level AI strategist.
